00207|   const loadChains = async () => {
00208|     try {
00209|       console.log('Loading chains from Relay and Rango...')
00210|       
00211|       // Load Relay chains first (always works)
00212|       const relayResponse = await relayAPI.getChains()
00213|       const relayChains = relayResponse.chains.filter(c => !c.disabled)
00214|       console.log('Loaded Relay chains:', relayChains.length)
00215|       
00216|       // Manually add Solana chain (hardcoded since Rango API might be slow)

00218|         id: 900000, // Unique ID for Solana
00219|         name: 'solana',

00236|         vmType: 'svm',

00239|       // Combine Relay chains with Solana

00241|       setChains(allChains)
00242|

00248|

00250|     } catch (error) {

00252|       toast.error('Failed to load chains')
